title: Port already in use
cause: Another process is already using the target port
solution: Stop the process using the port or switch to a different port

title: File or directory does not exist
cause: The path is wrong or the file has not been created yet
solution: Check the path spelling and confirm the file exists

title: Permission denied
cause: The current user does not have permission to perform this action
solution: Use sudo or update the file permissions

title: Connection refused
cause: The target service is not running or the port is incorrect
solution: Make sure the service is running and verify the host and port

title: Out of memory
cause: The system or process has exhausted available memory
solution: Increase the memory limit or reduce memory usage

title: Connection timed out
cause: The network is unreachable or the target service is responding too slowly
solution: Check the network connection and firewall settings

title: Module not found
cause: A dependency is missing or the import path is incorrect
solution: Run npm install or verify the import path

title: Cross-origin request blocked
cause: The server response is missing the required CORS headers
solution: Add the appropriate Access-Control-Allow-Origin header on the server

title: OpenSSL incompatibility
solution: Set the compatibility environment variable or switch to an older Node.js version

title: Operation not permitted
cause: The file is locked or the current user lacks permission
solution: Close the process using the file, or run the command with elevated permissions
